title: Prove the first-view workspace with runtime evidence
summary: Make the first viewport read like a real tool workspace, then capture runtime evidence and approved assets that prove the state.
acceptance: The first viewport shows the actual tool workspace instead of a marketing-style hero.
Primary source, result canvas, and inspector roles are visually distinct and believable.
A current runtime screenshot is captured and registered as an approved asset.
notes: Completed with the source / main canvas / inspector first view and runtime screenshot capture.
